name: coding
description: Engineering operations: tmux multi-pane sprint orchestration, PR review, sprint supervision, GitHub-Queue sync, swarm dispatch, end-to-end AI-benchmark contribution (run-benchmark), CI triage, failing-check fixing, source-citation registries, scaffold hygiene, disk cleanup, and the skills-meta drift auditor.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering operations, sprint management, CI triage, and review skills.
interface.longDescription: A bundled coding operations toolkit for tmux sprint orchestration, sprint supervision, sprint updates, merge review, audit swarms, CI triage, scaffold hygiene, disk cleanup, and skill metadata drift checks. In Codex Desktop it can also use app tools for GitHub, Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, browser automation, and parallel sub-agents when those tools are available.
